author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Design decisions: (1) Manual Module impls for all structs ‚Äî derive macro can't handle 3D‚Üí2D reshape for Linear/Embedding or residual connections. (2) Minimal BPE tokenizer reading GPT-2's encoder.json/vocab.bpe ‚Äî avoids heavy tokenizers crate dep. (3) Weight loading handles HF's fused c_attn‚Üísplit q/k/v + transpose conv1d weights. (4) Embedding.forward takes 1-D input, so batch embedding needs flatten‚Üíembed‚Üíreshape helper.
